name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: At 4460 Blanding Blvd in Jacksonville, FL, Cash America Pawn offers fast pawn loans for jewelry, electronics, and gold.
description_long:
Located at 4460 Blanding Blvd in Jacksonville, FL, Cash America Pawn is a full-service pawn shop serving the greater Jacksonville community. This standalone location offers a wide selection of pre-owned jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables in a clean, professional environment. The shop operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM, Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM, and Sunday from 12 PM to 5 PM.

At this Jacksonville location, Cash America Pawn provides pawn loans, buying, and selling services for items ranging from jewelry and watches to electronics and collectibles. Whether you need immediate cash or are looking to purchase quality pre-owned items, the knowledgeable staff at this FL store can assist you. For specific questions about items or services, call +1 904-778-0088.

If you're a Jacksonville resident in need of quick cash or interested in buying quality pre-owned merchandise, this Cash America Pawn location on Blanding Blvd is conveniently located and worth a visit. Bring a valid government-issued ID, and if pawning an item, be prepared to describe what you're offering. Cash America Pawn has been a trusted local option for Jacksonville residents seeking flexible lending and buying services.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America provide convenient access
Fast cash loans with no credit check required—pawn loans are available to anyone with valuable collateral
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers are not personally liable if pledged items are not reclaimed
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000) provides corporate stability and transparency
Buys gold, silver, and platinum on the spot, converting precious metals to immediate cash
Layaway service offers affordable 10% down payment alternative for retail purchases
Diverse inventory across locations (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments) creates buying and selling opportunities
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical collateral with genuine risk of permanent loss if loan not repaid
Pawn loan terms, interest rates, and holding periods vary by location and are not standardized company-wide
The merchandise resale model means customers are competing with the company's own inventory for goods at potentially higher markups
No mention of financial counseling or education about loan terms on the main website—borrowers must visit individual stores
Layaway service requires 10% down and ongoing payments, which may not be realistic for extremely cash-constrained consumers
best_for: People needing emergency cash who own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) and don't have access to credit
Consumers seeking short-term loans without credit checks or bank involvement
Budget shoppers looking for discounted merchandise or layaway alternatives to full upfront retail payment
Individuals with precious metals (gold, silver, platinum) they want to convert quickly to cash
diagnosis: FirstCash is best suited for cash-constrained consumers who own valuable items and need fast funds without credit checks or bank approval. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry the risk of permanent loss of collateral if repayment deadlines are missed—this is fundamentally riskier than traditional credit products and requires careful financial planning before pledging items.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Gold, silver, and platinum buying (immediate cash payment)
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Item hunting and inventory browsing across 3,300+ store network
Store locator tool to find nearest location
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
Cash payment on the spot for items purchased
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 4460 Blanding Blvd, Jacksonville, FL. Fast pawn loans and quality pre-owned items.
